auth.label: Content Delivery API Access Token
auth.description: Storyblok Content Delivery API public or preview token sent as the token query parameter. Create or manage per-space tokens from a Storyblok space under Settings > Access Tokens: https://www.storyblok.com/docs/concepts/access-tokens.

extraFields.label: Space Region
extraFields.description: Storyblok space server location used to choose the Content Delivery API endpoint. Use one of eu, us, ca, ap, or cn as documented in the Content Delivery API introduction: https://www.storyblok.com/docs/api/content-delivery/v2.

actions.name: get_space
actions.description: Retrieve metadata for the Storyblok space associated with the access token.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving the current Storyblok space.

domain.description: Domain associated with the Storyblok space.

anyOf.description: Storyblok cache version as a number.
Storyblok cache version as a string.

language_codes.description: Language codes configured in the Storyblok space.

actions.name: get_story
actions.description: Retrieve one Storyblok story by full slug, numeric ID, or UUID.

story.description: Story full slug, numeric ID, or UUID to place in the path.

find_by.description: Story lookup mode required when story is a UUID.

from_release.description: Release ID to request a story version from.

resolve_links_level.description: Number of link levels to resolve.

resolve_relations.description: Comma-separated component.field references to resolve as stories.

resolve_assets.description: Storyblok numeric boolean flag, where 1 means yes and 0 means no.

fallback_lang.description: Fallback language code configured in the space.

language.description: Language code configured in the space.

inputSchema.description: Path and query parameters for retrieving one Storyblok story.

content.description: Storyblok story content object shaped by the space's component schema.

anyOf.description: Date configured for sorting the story.

is_startpage.description: Whether the story is the start page for a folder.

group_id.description: Story group UUID shared between alternates.

anyOf.description: Release ID when requested from a release.

content.description: Storyblok story content object shaped by the space's component schema.

anyOf.description: Date configured for sorting the story.

is_startpage.description: Whether the story is the start page for a folder.

group_id.description: Story group UUID shared between alternates.

anyOf.description: Release ID when requested from a release.

is_folder.description: Whether the object is a folder.

is_startpage.description: Whether the story is the start page for a folder.

real_path.description: Resolved real path with a leading slash.

rel_uuids.description: Referenced story UUIDs that exceeded the resolution limit.

link_uuids.description: Linked story UUIDs that exceeded the resolution limit.

actions.name: list_datasource_entries
actions.description: List Storyblok datasource entries, optionally filtered by datasource and dimension.

datasource.description: Datasource slug to filter entries by.

page.description: Page number to request from Storyblok.

per_page.description: Datasource entries to request per page.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Storyblok datasource entries.

value.description: Entry value in the default dimension.

dimension_value.description: Entry value for the requested dimension.

datasource_entries.description: Datasource entries returned for the current page.

total.description: Total number of matching items reported by Storyblok.

per_page.description: Number of items per page reported by Storyblok.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata derived from Storyblok response headers.

page.description: Page number to request from Storyblok.

per_page.description: Maximum number of items to request per page.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Storyblok datasources.

datasources.description: Datasources returned for the current page.

total.description: Total number of matching items reported by Storyblok.

per_page.description: Number of items per page reported by Storyblok.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata derived from Storyblok response headers.

actions.name: list_links
actions.description: List compact Storyblok link records for stories and folders in a space.

starts_with.description: Return links whose full_slug starts with this value.

with_parent.description: Folder ID used to filter links, or 0 for root entries.

include_dates.description: Storyblok numeric boolean flag, where 1 means yes and 0 means no.

page.description: Page number to request from Storyblok.

paginated.description: Storyblok numeric boolean flag, where 1 means yes and 0 means no.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Storyblok links.

is_folder.description: Whether the object is a folder.

is_startpage.description: Whether the story is the start page for a folder.

real_path.description: Resolved real path with a leading slash.

links.description: Storyblok links keyed by story or folder UUID.

total.description: Total number of matching items reported by Storyblok.

per_page.description: Number of items per page reported by Storyblok.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata derived from Storyblok response headers.

actions.name: list_stories
actions.description: List Storyblok stories with pagination, content filters, language, and relation resolution options.

from_release.description: Release ID to request a story version from.

resolve_links_level.description: Number of link levels to resolve.

resolve_relations.description: Comma-separated component.field references to resolve as stories.

resolve_assets.description: Storyblok numeric boolean flag, where 1 means yes and 0 means no.

fallback_lang.description: Fallback language code configured in the space.

language.description: Language code configured in the space.

starts_with.description: Return stories whose full_slug starts with this value.

search_term.description: Search term applied to story name, slug, full slug, and content.

page.description: Page number to request from Storyblok.

by_slugs.description: Comma-separated full slugs to include, with wildcard support.

excluding_slugs.description: Comma-separated full slugs to exclude, with wildcard support.

by_uuids_ordered.description: Comma-separated story UUIDs to include while preserving request order.

with_tag.description: Comma-separated tag slugs used to filter stories.

additionalProperties.description: Storyblok filter operators for one field.

filter_query.description: Storyblok filter_query object keyed by field name.

level.description: Folder level used to filter returned stories.

is_startpage.description: Storyblok numeric boolean flag, where 1 means yes and 0 means no.

first_published_at_gt.description: Return stories first published after this timestamp.

first_published_at_lt.description: Return stories first published before this timestamp.

published_at_gt.description: Return stories published after this timestamp.

published_at_lt.description: Return stories published before this timestamp.

published_at_gte.description: Return stories published on or after this timestamp.

published_at_lte.description: Return stories published on or before this timestamp.

updated_at_gt.description: Return stories updated after this timestamp.

updated_at_lt.description: Return stories updated before this timestamp.

excluding_fields.description: Comma-separated content field names to exclude.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Storyblok stories.

content.description: Storyblok story content object shaped by the space's component schema.

anyOf.description: Date configured for sorting the story.

is_startpage.description: Whether the story is the start page for a folder.

group_id.description: Story group UUID shared between alternates.

anyOf.description: Release ID when requested from a release.

stories.description: Stories returned for the current page.

anyOf.description: Date configured for sorting the story.

is_startpage.description: Whether the story is the start page for a folder.

group_id.description: Story group UUID shared between alternates.

is_folder.description: Whether the object is a folder.

is_startpage.description: Whether the story is the start page for a folder.

real_path.description: Resolved real path with a leading slash.

rel_uuids.description: Referenced story UUIDs that exceeded the resolution limit.

link_uuids.description: Linked story UUIDs that exceeded the resolution limit.

total.description: Total number of matching items reported by Storyblok.

per_page.description: Number of items per page reported by Storyblok.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata derived from Storyblok response headers.

actions.name: list_tags
actions.description: List Storyblok tags assigned to stories in the current space.

starts_with.description: Return tags assigned to stories whose full_slug starts with this value.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Storyblok tags.

taggings_count.description: Number of stories assigned to the tag.
